zh.lifeSummary: 當Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem於1136年出生在法國安喬時，他的父親Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem47歲，母親Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem31歲。他於大約1158年與Agnes de Courtenay在敘利亞馬可 素瓦a也泰結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1163年登記服兵役。他去世於1174年7月11日在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年38歲，埋葬在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem于1136年出生在法国安喬时，他的父亲Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem47岁，母亲Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem31岁。他于大约1158年与Agnes de Courtenay在叙利亚馬可 素瓦a也泰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1163年登记服兵役。他去世于1174年7月11日在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年38岁，埋葬在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: Ayyubid dynasty. Saladin overthrows the Fatimid ruler and becomes the sultan of Egypt.

en.lifeSummary: When Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem was born in 1136, in Anjou, France, his father, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, was 47 and his mother, Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem, was 31. He married Agnes de Courtenay about 1158, in Tyre, As Suwaydā', Syria. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1163. He died on 11 July 1174, in Jerusalem, West Bank, Palestine, at the age of 38, and was buried in Jerusalem, West Bank, Palestine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem est né en 1136, à Anjou, France, son père, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Courtenay environ 1158, à Tyre, As Suwaydā', Syrie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1163. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1174, à Jerusalem, Cisjordanie, Palestine, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Jerusalem, Cisjordanie, Palestine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem 1136 in Anjou, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem 47 und seine Mutter Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem 31. Er hat um 1158 in Tyre, As Suwaydā', Syrien Agnes de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1163 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. Juli 1174 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Jerusalem, Westjordanland, Palästina und wurde in Jerusalem, Westjordanland, Palästina begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem è nato il nel 1136 nel Anjou, Francia, il suo padre, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Courtenay circa 1158, nel Tyre, As Suwaydā', Siria. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1163. Morì il 11 luglio 1174, nel Jerusalem, Cisgiordania, Palestina, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Jerusalem, Cisgiordania, Palestina.

ja.lifeSummary: Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalemが1136年にフランスアンジョウで生まれた時，父Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalemは47歳，母Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalemは31歳であった。約1158年にシリアアス スワイドa'トイアでAgnes de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1163年に兵役登録をした。彼は1174年7月11日にパレスチナヨルダン川西岸地区ジャーウサレムで38歳で死去し，パレスチナヨルダン川西岸地区ジャーウサレムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem(이)가 1136년 프랑스 앤조우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1158년 시리아 아스 수웨이드a' 타이어에서 Agnes de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1163년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1174년 7월 11일 팔레스타인 팔레스타인 제루사렘에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 팔레스타인 팔레스타인 제루사렘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem nasceu em 1136, em Anjou, França, seu pai, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Courtenay aproximadamente 1158, em Tyre, As Suwaydā', Síria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1163. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1174, em Jerusalem, Cisjordânia, Palestina, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Jerusalem, Cisjordânia, Palestina.

ru.Jerusalem, Kingdom of Jerusalem: джирсеилем, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина
ru.Jerusalem Kingdom of Jerusalem: джирсеилем, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина
ru.Jerusalem, Kingdom of Jerusalem: джирсеилем, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem родился в 1136 г. в местности анджоу, Франция, его отцу по имени Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Courtenay около 1158 г. в местности тир, ас сувеидa', Сирия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1163 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 июля 1174 г. в местности джирсеилем, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности джирсеилем, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem nació en 1136, en Anjou, Francia, su papá, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mélisende de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnes de Courtenay aproximadamente 1158, en Tyre, As Suwaydā', Siria. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1163. Murió el 11 de julio de 1174, en Jerusalem, Cisjordania, Palestina, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Jerusalem, Cisjordania, Palestina.
